title: Savory Velvety Light Algerian Padron Peppers Stir-fry
description: This dish combines savory flavors with a velvety texture from blending and using fresh ginger in a gluten-free-friendly preparation of algerian peppers.

ingredients.name: 1 cup finely chopped Algerian pepper
ingredients.notes: Use a mix of mild and hot varieties to control heat intensity.

ingredients.name: 1 tablespoon fresh ginger, minced
ingredients.notes: For added depth of flavor and texture.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup unsalted butter
ingredients.notes: Use to enrich the dish with a creamy mouthfeel.

ingredients.name: Chopped fresh parsley or cilantro for garnish (optional)

instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat. Add butter and melt it.
Add minced ginger, garlic, and salt to the melted butter in the pan. Stir-fry until fragrant and slightly golden, about 2 minutes.
Increase heat to high, then add chopped pepper and lemon juice. Stir quickly to coat the peppers with the mixture.
Reduce heat to medium-low and cook for an additional 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the peppers are just tender but still crisp.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed with salt and pepper.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro (if using).
Garnish can be omitted as per your preference.
